title: androsace vitaliana subsp. nevadensis
intro: Androsace vitaliana subsp. nevadensis, also known as Nevada Rock Jasmine, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the Primulaceae family, characterized by its small white flowers and delicate foliage. Traditionally, Nevada Rock Jasmine has been used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to its essential oils and flavonoids. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and possibly supporting respiratory health. Herbal preparations of Nevada Rock Jasmine typically involve infusions or decoctions of the plant's leaves and stems, which are used in teas, tinctures, and topical applications.
